story_title: 場地白模產生器 (階段一)
current_task: [FRONTEND] 依平面圖資料建立 3D 白模(Three.js + react-three-fiber):地板多邊形擠出薄板、牆沿線段擠出、柱子箱體,固定高度 3m,「產生 3D 模型」按鈕
notes: Floor-plan direction. Tasks 1-3 committed (8401ee2, 20747d7, b4f1db9). Task 4 implement complete: installed three+@react-three/fiber+@react-three/drei (no peer conflicts); added VenueScene.tsx/VenueSceneLoader.tsx (ExtrudeGeometry floor, per-wall/column BoxGeometry meshes, dynamic ssr:false loader mirroring PlanEditorLoader); PlanEditor.tsx got sceneSnapshot/generation state, handleGenerate3D, 產生 3D 模型 button, data-scene-generated/data-generation attrs, scene mounted keyed by generation below the Stage. PR review (iteration 1) independently re-verified both flagged sign-convention risks with standalone three.js scripts (floor bbox: y -0.1->0 confirmed; wall rotation dot(planDir,worldDir)=1 confirmed on 6 test segments) rather than trusting the implementer's report, confirmed lint/tsc clean, no TODOs/any-types, deps correctly in package.json dependencies with no --legacy-peer-deps. APPROVED, no critical or should-fix issues, 2 minor consider-only suggestions logged. QA (iteration 1) performed genuinely independent live-browser testing covering frozen-scene positional freeze (not just mesh-count), column-only generation, mixed-method full deletion sequence, 40-object stress load, mid-drag click semantics, multi-reload hydration check, and visual screenshot inspection. 0 bugs found. APPROVED. FINAL playwright gate (this run): re-ran the full suite fresh against a clean `npm run dev` rather than trusting prior stage reports — actual result 51/51 PASS (9 Task1 + 17 Task2 + 16 Task3 + 9 Task4), correcting the '60/60' figure that had propagated through review/qa notes (an overcount, not a real regression — no test files were removed or lost). All 8 Clarified ACs + edge cases in orchestrator-output.md cross-checked against venue-3d-scene.spec.ts's 9 tests: full coverage confirmed. Independently re-ran eslint + tsc --noEmit clean. Committed 69e825e (VenueScene.tsx, VenueSceneLoader.tsx, PlanEditor.tsx, venue-3d-scene.spec.ts, PlanEditorPage.ts, manual-tests/venue-plan-editor.md, package.json/package-lock.json, story checkbox). Task 4 of 5 complete; story NOT complete (Task 5 — 3D viewer integration with orbit controls + 2D/3D switching — remains).
